TestFeature.Assertion: The address selected by AutoIP is in the valid range of 169.254/16

ManualInstructions.Preconditions: 1. The device must be configured on AutoIP mode. 2. Turn the device off and Press OK to continue.
ManualInstructions.Action: 1. Turn the device on and Press OK to continue.

Failure.Description: The Auto IP Address assigned is not in the valid range of 169.254/16
Failed to receive a valid Notify with ssdp:alive packets after waiting for %d seconds

TestFeature.Assertion: The address selected by DHCP is in the valid range of 192.168.0.0 To 192.168.255.255

ManualInstructions.Preconditions: 1. The Device must periodically broadcast its ssdp:alive discovery messages.
ManualInstructions.Action: 1. Configure a DHCP Server with Scope From 192.168.0.0 To 192.168.255.255. 2. Turn the Dhcp Server ON and Press OK to continue.

Failure.Description: The DHCP Address assigned is not in the range of 192.168.0.0 To 192.168.255.255
Failed to receive a valid Notify with ssdp:alive packets after waiting for %d seconds
